message.title: message
message.description: Status message indicating reviews found or not found.

reviewDisplayList.title: reviewDisplayList
reviewDisplayList.description:
Clean numbered list of all reviews for this test 
drive showing review text and rating. Display this 
exactly as returned to the user. Do not modify.

reviewExists.title: reviewExists
reviewExists.description:
True if reviews exist for this test drive.
False if no reviews found for this test drive.

reviewIdMap.title: reviewIdMap
reviewIdMap.description:
Number to review IDs mapping in format
1##reviewId##rating||2##reviewId##rating.
Split on || to get entries then split each entry
on ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = reviewId
Part 3 = current rating
Store silently. Never show to user.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description:
Total number of reviews found for this test drive.
Use this to decide how to display reviews to user.
